name: The White House
subject: Promoting Freedom at Home and Abroad
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=56e4746eda225e66cec2ac8a92e2f76aede037ed12c7bba612ae62e6212759cbc4fe1caaca2a362fb9c74a32d7f648670426fa84ecd5b9db

President Trump Announces New Strategy in Iran
Last Friday, President Donald J. Trump announced his Administration’s strategy for addressing the rogue regime in Iran and announced his decision not to certify under the Iran Nuclear Agreement Act (INARA).

The strategy the President outlined included four major objectives, the first of which is working with allies to “counter the regime’s destabilizing activity and support for terrorist proxies in the region.” President Trump also vowed to “place additional sanctions on the regime to block their financing of terror.” Third, the President plans to “address the regime’s proliferation of missiles and weapons that threaten its neighbors, global trade, and freedom of navigation.” Finally, the President promised to take necessary steps to “deny the regime all paths to a nuclear weapon.”

“We will not continue down a path whose predictable conclusion is more violence, more terror," President Trump said.

Read the full announcement
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=56e4746eda225e66818dbdb9c8bfe8fbf67fdcd97048b0cc14393c77cab85aad8137ad7a5d25a922ced683130eaeb434056bab4a887e64d6
here.

Tax Reform
Today, the President will host a meeting with his Cabinet to discuss the Trump Administration’s plan for tax relief. President Trump’s plan will promote American economic prosperity through the implementation of four key priorities for tax reform – cutting taxes for every day Americans, simplifying the tax code, giving businesses a competitive edge, and investing in America. The Unified Framework will eliminate loopholes, reduce paperwork to once page, and bring back trillions of dollars of wealth parked overseas. President Trump’s tax reform plan is pro-growth, pro-jobs, pro-worker, and pro-America.

Learn more about President Trump’s tax reform plan
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=56e4746eda225e66517da928a199ac5283b0a3930f8d3ea2640a3a783d5412cc502db239c0044f12355a59b0faaf750d188664d17787a449
here.

President Trump Delivers Remarks at Values Voter Summit
President Trump delivered remarks at the Values Voter Summit in Washington, D.C. on Friday morning. The 2017 conference was President Trump’s second appearance at the Values Voter Summit, having visited as the Republican presidential candidate in October 2016.

President Trump reaffirmed his Administration’s promise to guard the religious liberties of American citizens by highlighting his decision to reinstate the Mexico City Policy, declare a National Day of Prayer, and defend churches and church leaders from targeted attacks by the federal government.
“And above all, we know this: In America, we don’t worship government- we worship God,” the President stated.

Read the President’s full remarks here
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8b7ae051640fa16400762db76e694fde9a182a9598ba3abeefc81820fd377e062eb3b1d201a18484af70cc11e7c4629f56676f41ad7b68f8
here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump at the United States Secret Service Training Facility | October 13, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS AND VP TODAY

Today, President Trump will receive his daily intelligence briefing and then host a meeting with his Cabinet. In the meeting, the President will provide direction concerning specific Administration and legislative priorities including tax reform, immigration, and disaster relief. Later, the President and Vice President will have lunch with Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.

In the afternoon, Vice President Pence will participate in the second round of the U.S.-Japan Economic Dialogue with Deputy Prime Minister Tarō Asō.

COMING UP

Tomorrow, President Trump will welcome the Prime Minister of Greece to the White House. The Vice President will be in Buffalo, New York, to meet with local businesses, community leaders, and families to discuss the need for tax reform in the United States.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8b7ae051640fa164af0a557830bf8684389aaa37354e7ab86ca51a0e550145229f0bc85021553ecd39191a9cad04c20db1a422f8c7e1cb25
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8b7ae051640fa164eae705b2738ecb5229705e0e1c9634c3d5ced7e728a6acf5111ae5da4fec6e933c5107c2763091270b70d1dff49258e9
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48c6e027b5f38c480aedc24497f772e4b2ea2395ae667f4f0017331ad761dd09a0adc161db07af6ddb97dc6451cc47ebf
Unsubscribe

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: Happy Boss's Day
body:
#
Friend,
Even though I am the Chairman of the Board at Our Revolution, I am not expecting any gifts today for Boss's Day. In fact, I would return them and encourage any boss's receiving gifts to give theirs back as well. The reason? As we face such extreme inequality in our country, it's hard to argue that most employers deserve a gift. Whether from their employees or their pals in Congress and the Trump administration.
For forty years, Congress has cut taxes for corporations while income inequality grows and millions of people are slowly cut off from basic health care, education, and nutrition.
[**Will you stand with us against tax cuts for corporations and the very wealthy? Add your name, today.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aec4/bed43eb/18e32ab6/75ff0750/3296223332/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stand-up-to-corporate-greed-b?source=em171016-subb")
Not only is Congress considering more tax cuts for the uber-wealthy at the expense of Medicare and Medicaid, the Trump administration just signed an executive order two days ago that is a giveaway to the insurance industry. Bosses don't need a day.
We need to stand up and fight for the 99% and reject the tax giveaway. We must stand together, today and every day, against corporate greed and against cuts in critical programs like Medicare and Medicaid.
[**Join us as we fight for a tax system that makes Wall Street and corporations pay their fair share.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aec4/bed43eb/18e32ab6/75ff0750/3296223332/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stand-up-to-corporate-greed-b?source=em171016-subb")
If you do end up celebrating Boss's Day today, I'm sure you have a good reason to, but make sure your boss adds their name as well.
We can't do this without you.
In Solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde74/2a380d31/2cfc802/fe1fc2/1542800072/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde74/2a380d31/2cfc802/fe1fc2/1542800072/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
It's alarming that this needs repeating in 2017, but a woman's health care decisions belong to her and her doctor -- not her employer, not Congress, and certainly not Donald Trump.
Yet Donald Trump and his administration have decided that revoking access to birth control is one of the most pressing issues of our time.
In a blatant attack on women's rights, Donald Trump just rolled back an Affordable Care Act requirement that employers include birth control coverage in their health insurance plans.
We just looked -- you haven't yet signed our online petition to tell the Trump administration to protect access to birth control and women's health care. [**We 're still short of the 10,000 signatures we need, so will you put your name down now?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde74/2a380d31/2cfc802/fe1fc3/1542800072/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/womensrights/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_birth-control%3Frefcode%3D20171012_birthcontrolJA_up")
Nine out of ten women of reproductive age will use contraception at some point in their lives. _Nine out of ten._ And since this benefit went into effect, women across the country have saved $1.4 billion on birth control.
Taking away this benefit undermines women's access to important health services, and it's critical that we all speak out against it. That's why we're asking you to please sign our petition to protect access to birth control and health care: [**http://act.maggiehassan.com/protect-birth-control**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde74/2a380d31/2cfc802/fe1fc3/1542800072/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/womensrights/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_birth-control%3Frefcode%3D20171012_birthcontrolJA_up")

Team Maggie

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a Trojan horse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Despite Republican control of both houses of Congress, President Trump was unable to achieve his goal of repealing the Affordable Care Act through the legislative process -- even under fast-track procedures that require only a 51-vote majority in the Senate. Americans stood up against Trumpcare, and their voices were heard.

But that's not the end of the story. Trump is determined to ignore the desire of millions of Americans and destroy the ACA. That's why in recent days he has used executive authority to do what Congress was unable to do -- sabotage health care by cutting off an important funding source for the ACA health exchanges. He also announced a Trojan horse plan to allow shoddy and deceptive insurance products to come to market -- products that will not provide sufficient coverage for those who sign up for them and will have virtually no consumer protections.

[**Please sign here to commit to join me in taking a stand AGAINST President Trump 's abuse of executive authority, which will damage our health care system and threaten coverage for millions of Americans.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ba3/70cdc2ba/46af95d9/397d89f/1326625692/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-stand-against-trump-s-dangerous-health-care-actions?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+sign+here+to+commit+to+join+me+in&utm_campaign=em101617&source=em101617")

It's no surprise these latest actions are overwhelmingly opposed by State Insurance Commissioners and other health professionals, who know this will lead to a death spiral in the insurance markets and less health care for Americans. Make no mistake about it: Trump's latest actions will mean that millions of Americans -- including children, seniors, lower and middle-income workers, and people with disabilities -- will experience huge price spikes that make coverage unaffordable.

Trump's decision to end the Affordable Care Act payments will wreak havoc in the individual markets -- creating massive uncertainty and serious consequences for the health outcomes of millions.

[**I know this fight is hard -- but our work isn't done. I'm asking you to stay engaged and keep the temperature turned up. Trump is cynically treating this as a political game. We need to let Trump know that the public does not see this as a game; access to affordable care is often a matter of life or death. We have no choice but to keep speaking up and fighting back.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ba3/70cdc2ba/46af95d9/397d89c/1326625692/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-stand-against-trump-s-dangerous-health-care-actions?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+I+know+this+fight+is+hard+mdash+but+our+&utm_campaign=em101617&source=em101617")

I am proud of everyone who has made calls, written letters, and marched to demand the basic right to health care. Your moving personal stories and action have made an enormous difference.

Keep up the fight,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate

subject: Obamacare isn't failing -- Trump's destroying it.

body:
Trump said this afternoon, "There is no such thing as ObamaCare anymore." Don't let him get away with destroying Obamacare.
---
**[](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954deb0/2b07114c/e349692c/731554b7/3269245608/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/protect-our-progress?source=PT-20171016-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")**

_**The Hill: "Trump: There is no such thing as ObamaCare anymore"**_
Team,

Here's what Trump said today during a Cabinet meeting:

> _**" ObamaCare is finished. It's dead. It's gone...There is no such thing as ObamaCare anymore."**_
Obamacare didn't just disappear -- Trump is taking deliberate action to destroy Obamacare and explode our nation's health care system. It's a reckless move that will hurt millions of Americans and we have to fight back now.

[**We can 't let Trump destroy all the progress we made on affordable health care under President Obama. Add your name right now to oppose Trump's Obamacare sabotage.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954deb0/2b07114c/e349692c/731554b7/3269245608/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/protect-our-progress?source=PT-20171016-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Trump couldn't pass Obamacare repeal through Congress, so now he's deliberately blowing up our nation's health care system through executive actions.

President Obama fought to guarantee that all insurance plans covered essential health benefits and protected people with pre-existing conditions -- but now Trump is creating junk plans that break the rules.

While President Obama worked tirelessly to make insurance coverage affordable for all Americans -- Trump's actions will make coverage too expensive for millions.

**We have to show the GOP that we won 't let Trump get away with these irresponsible decisions. Add your name now to oppose Trump's attempts to destroy Obamacare:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/protect-our-progress**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954deb0/2b07114c/e349692c/731554b7/3269245608/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/protect-our-progress?source=PT-20171016-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Team DSCC

name: Paul
subject: Christmas is canceled?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
**_Ryan Threatens to Keep Members in for Christmas to Finish Tax Overhaul_**

-Roll Call

You heard it right, Friend. I don't care if I have to keep members of Congress working through Christmas -- we will get tax reform done.

People in our country are hurting. Half of all Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. **We must give them the relief they need -- fast. We must reform our ridiculously complicated, unfair tax code. **

So yes, Friend, I will cancel Christmas break for Washington if that's what it takes to win the fight against the special interest groups and Washington lobbyists who want to stick with the status quo.
**
I believe Americans deserve better. I believe you deserve better.** You deserve a tax code that works for you -- one that lets you keep more of your paycheck, one that shows you where your money actually goes.

I will fight for you and get this done, no matter how long it takes. [**Will you join me?**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzEwNDU1ODYS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjEwNTk2OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you for your support,

Paul D. Ryan
